column1: # MedTender Performance Benchmark Results — 30 iterations × 9 endpoints
# Methodology: 3 warm-up iterations + 30 measured iterations per endpoint
# Inter-request delay: 650ms (to stay under 100 req/min rate limit)
# Measurement method: Node.js performance.now() — round-trip HTTP client latency
# ALL endpoints under 500ms SLO: YES ✅ (270/270 requests)
